issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttacked' (protection during battle), not 'Activated'
Condition is 'Always' but should check: LeaderHasType 'Supernovas' AND opponent has 3+ Life cards
Action is 'PowerBoost' with amount 0, but effect prevents K.O. in battle — should use 'GiveKeyword' with 'CannnotBeKOdInBattle' or similar protective keyword
Effect structure does not match card's protective mechanic; card grants battle immunity conditional on Leader type and opponent life threshold
